## Solving the Toughest Materials Challenges for Industry Leaders
# Quantistry’s Materials Simulation Software empowers R&D teams in energy storage, alloy design, and advanced materials innovation accelerating discovery and engineering the materials of the future.
## Industries
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68b04296fcd65c2e646de536/68bff0f9d5d2b93984869446_battery-icon.svg)
### Energy Storage
Accelerating battery R&D with safer, longer-lasting materials for next-generation energy storage solutions.
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68b04296fcd65c2e646de536/68bace34179065a7dd8de683_more-icon.svg) Read a Success Story](https://www.quantistry.ai/customers#energy-dynamics)

Advancing aerospace innovation with alloy design and high-performance materials for sustainable flight and space exploration.

Enabling the creation of lightweight, safe, and sustainable vehicle components with Quantistry’s digital R&D for materials innovation.

## Materials Simulation for Aeronautics and Space
### Quantistry Validates Green Innovation Path for Leading Aerospace Manufacturer
AeroDynamics*, a global aerospace leader, faced mounting pressure to eliminate environmentally harmful surface treatments while meeting the stringent reliability and certification standards of the industry. With Quantistry’s materials intelligence platform, powered by quantum chemistry modeling, the company accelerated its shift to greener, more sustainable aerospace materials.   
  
AeroDynamics began with a proof-of-concept project, leveraging Quantistry’s AI for materials science platform, combined with internal experts and third-party validation, to create a digital-first framework for aerospace innovation.
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68b04296fcd65c2e646de536/68b051563889a74f108c27ac_icons.svg) Download the full Story](https://www.quantistry.ai/customers)
![Quantistry validates green aerospace innovation using AI for materials science and digital R&D, enabling a leading aerospace manufacturer to achieve 90% faster results, lab-grade accuracy, and eliminate blind synthesis.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68b04296fcd65c2e646de536/68c04fd50f6cf5f67080d838_3b95e8cee6d8f81c0cf16e28c366eb8324a4fe49.webp)
#### ~90% 
#### time 
#### reduction
#### Lab-grade accuracy
#### virtually
#### Eliminated
#### blind synthesis 
*Names have been changed. Quantistry works in close collaboration with the materials innovation organizations of market-leading companies. The specific outcomes and our customers are often strictly confidential.
## Mobility
### Accelerating Next-Generation Electrode and Battery R&D for a Global Vehicle Manufacturer
![Quantistry accelerates Li-ion battery R&D for a global vehicle manufacturer by validating next-generation electrode materials, enabling 15x faster innovation, earlier IP generation, and eliminating experimental cycles.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68b04296fcd65c2e646de536/68c05824f2b48acd60c78120_680c5e07e684bce4038f35f470c33c5733c3df56.webp)
AutoDynamics, a leading commercial vehicle manufacturer, faced a key challenge in battery R&D: finding and validating innovative electrode materials for Li-ion development that improve performance, cost-efficiency, and sustainability. To solve this, AutoDynamics launched a closed-loop collaboration with Quantistry. By combining Quantistry’s materials simulation software with internal R&D teams and external suppliers, they created a digital-first framework that enabled rapid iteration, clear decision points, and faster innovation across the mobility supply chain.
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68b04296fcd65c2e646de536/68b051563889a74f108c27ac_icons.svg) Download the full Story](https://www.quantistry.ai/customers)
#### ~15x
#### faster
#### 6-9 months
#### earlier
#### IP generation
#### Eliminated
#### experimental cycles
*Names have been changed. Quantistry works in close collaboration with the materials innovation organizations of market-leading companies. The specific outcomes and our customers are often strictly confidential.
### Materials Simulation for Energy Storage
## Breaking Through Alloy Design Bottlenecks for a Global Energy Technology Leader
EnergyDynamics*, a global energy technology leader, faced a critical challenge in alloy design and development: predicting and optimizing advanced metallic materials under extreme operating conditions, while meeting rising demands for performance and sustainability.  
  
Starting with benchmark validation against experimental data, EnergyDynamics rapidly scaled to digital alloy design workflows powered by Quantistry’s materials simulation software. By combining Quantistry’s AI for materials science with internal expertise, the team accelerated discovery, reduced risk, and expanded the range of compositions evaluated.
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68b04296fcd65c2e646de536/68b051563889a74f108c27ac_icons.svg) Download the full Story](https://www.quantistry.ai/customers)
![Quantistry supports alloy design innovation for a global energy technology leader, using AI-driven materials simulation to cut risk by 80%, evaluate 10x more compositions, and enhance reliability in extreme operating conditions.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68b04296fcd65c2e646de536/68c059b4d711bf8e28745a2d_1864adb8088aecee703a61c1dfb41c7657c19da8.webp)
#### 80%
#### risk
#### reduction
#### 10x more
#### compositions
#### evaluated
#### Enhanced
#### reliability
*Names have been changed. Quantistry works in close collaboration with the materials innovation organizations of market-leading companies. The specific outcomes and our customers are often strictly confidential.
## Materials Simulation for Energy Storage
### Breaking Through Battery R&D Bottlenecks
![Quantistry helps PowerDynamics overcome battery R&D bottlenecks with AI-driven electrolyte simulation, achieving 96% cost reduction, 10x higher screening output, and enhanced reliability](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68b04296fcd65c2e646de536/68c9150802ea9a2f037f719f_power-dynamics.webp)
PowerDynamics*, a leader in automotive battery technology, faced a major challenge in battery R&D: optimizing electrolyte formulations through costly trial-and-error methods. These formulations are crucial for next-gen battery performance, affecting energy density, charging speed, safety, and lifespan. Traditional approaches struggle with complex molecular interactions, leading to months of expensive lab work.  
  
PowerDynamics began with a platform trial, then rapidly scaled to independent digital R&D workflows powered by Quantistry’s materials simulation software. By integrating Quantistry’s AI for materials science seamlessly into their existing processes, the company accelerated discovery while reducing costly lab testing.
#### "The rapid insights gained from Quantistry were beyond our expectations. It's rare to find a platform that so quickly becomes integral to our R&D work in battery materials.," 
**explains the leader at PowerDynamics**
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68b04296fcd65c2e646de536/68b051563889a74f108c27ac_icons.svg) Download the full Story](https://www.quantistry.ai/customers)
#### 96%
#### reduction
#### of cost
#### 10x increased
#### screening
#### output
#### Enhanced
#### reliability
*Names have been changed. Quantistry works in close collaboration with the materials innovation organizations of market-leading companies. The specific outcomes and our customers are often strictly confidential.
